title: EnergyProductionMeasurement schema
description: Energy production measurements for an energy generator over a time interval and at an observation instant.

type.description: Property. NGSI entity type. It has to be EnergyProductionMeasurement.

refGenerator.description: Relationship. Reference to the energy generator to which the measurement applies.

dateObservedFrom.description: Property. Start of the energy measurement interval in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dateObservedTo.description: Property. End of the energy measurement interval in ISO 8601 format. It must be later than dateObservedFrom. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dataProvider.description: Property. Identifier of the data provider. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.

dateCreated.description: Property. Entity creation date and time in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dateModified.description: Property. Date and time of the latest entity modification in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

dateObserved.description: Property. Observation instant for instantaneous quantities in ISO 8601 format. Model:'https://schema.org/DateTime'.

energyGenerated.description: Property. Total active energy generated during the measurement interval, normally expressed in kilowatt-hours. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

activeEnergyExport.description: Property. Active energy exported to the grid during the measurement interval, normally expressed in kilowatt-hours. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

reactiveEnergyExport.description: Property. Reactive energy exported to the grid during the measurement interval, normally expressed in kilovolt-ampere reactive hours. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

apparentEnergyExport.description: Property. Apparent energy exported to the grid during the measurement interval, normally expressed in kilovolt-ampere hours. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

activePower.description: Property. Instantaneous active power, as a total or values per phase, normally expressed in kilowatts. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

reactivePower.description: Property. Instantaneous reactive power, as a total or values per phase, normally expressed in kilovolt-amperes reactive. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

apparentPower.description: Property. Instantaneous apparent power, as a total or values per phase, normally expressed in kilovolt-amperes. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

voltage.description: Property. Voltage, as a total or values per phase, normally expressed in volts. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

current.description: Property. Current, as a total or values per phase, normally expressed in amperes. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

frequency.description: Property. Grid frequency at the observation instant, normally expressed in hertz. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

powerFactor.description: Property. Power factor at the observation instant. Model:'https://schema.org/Number'.

source.description: Property. URL of the original data source. Model:'https://schema.org/Text'.
